source_quote: On February 19, 2015, New Mountain Capital delivered an unsolicited indication of interest to the Company to acquire us for a per share price of $19.25. The indication of interest was supported by a highly confident financing letter from Jefferies Finance LLC, contained a request for a forty-five day exclusivity period and contemplated a "go-shop" period following the signing of any definitive merger agreement.

additional_note: NMC indicated this was 'the highest price it was willing to offer'. Exclusivity period request was 45 days.

source_quote: our board of directors unanimously determined that the merger agreement and the transactions contemplated thereby, including the merger, were advisable and in the best interests of our stockholders and our board of directors resolved to recommend that our stockholders approve the adoption of the merger agreement.
